register.title: Planning Approval Denial / Delay
register.description: MPKT rejects or delays development plan — forces redesign, delays groundbreak by 12–18 months, increases holding costs.

register.title: O&G Upstream Activity Decline (PIC)
register.description: PETRONAS capex reduction or sustained low oil prices reduce industrial demand in PIC zone, impacting future tenant / offtake pipeline.

register.title: Maybank Facility Covenant Breach
register.description: Land value decline below 2.0× facility drawn could trigger Maybank covenant review; currently 2.28× — adequate buffer but limited.

register.title: PIPC Non-Performance / Withdrawal
register.description: PIPC Consortium (30% partner) has not committed additional development capital; disagreement could delay decision-making and groundbreak.

register.title: Additional DoE Conditions Post-EIA
register.description: DoE may impose additional environmental mitigation conditions during detailed planning review, increasing development cost by MYR 500K–1M.

register.title: Maybank IPO Disclosure Requirement
register.description: Corporate guarantee from GoWell Energy Solutions requires Maybank consent for material change in GoWell's ownership (IPO).

register.title: MYR Currency Depreciation
register.description: USD-reporting portfolio — MYR depreciation against USD reduces USD-equivalent land value; 10% MYR depreciation = -$341K USD impact.

scenarios.name: Planning Delayed 18 months — Extended Holding Period
scenarios.verdict: Maybank LTV covenant remains technically compliant at 46.9% vs. the 50% limit — but barely. Extended holding adds ~$140K additional costs. Monitoring required.

scenarios.name: Oil Price Collapse — Reduced PIC Industrial Demand
scenarios.verdict: Covenant breach — LTV exceeds 50% threshold. Maybank would require either partial facility repayment or additional security. High-severity low-probability scenario.

mitigationPlan.action: Monthly status calls with MPKT liaison; engage InvestJohor for expedited processing support if delayed beyond Q3 2026
Commission updated land valuation (C H Williams) before Maybank annual review; maintain 2.0× LTV buffer
Notify Maybank of planned IPO and seek advance written consent for change-of-control
